entity: Golden State Warriors 2015-16 (73-9, league-best .563 eFG% per BBR): 82 games, 73 wins, eFG% rank 1 in the four-factors dashboard
notes: Integer facts only — the eFG% value itself is a per-game average (.564) that differs from BBR's possession-weighted .563, so the rank (1st, exact) carries the shooting assertion. Wins come from the game fact table join.
